languages.text: {n}Обозрев поблескивающий запыленными видскринами когитатор, Эоганн издает низкий рокочущий вздох.{/n} "Жизненные функции благой машины на грани угасания. Я сделаю для нее все, что смогу, но сей когитатор являет собой печальный пример того, что даже творения Омниссии смертны".

{n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."
languages.original_text: {n}Обозрев поблескивающий запыленными видскринами когитатор, Эоганн издает низкий рокочущий вздох.{/n} "Жизненные функции благой машины на грани угасания. Я сделаю для нее все, что смогу, но сей когитатор являет собой печальный пример того, что даже творения Омниссии смертны".

I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

languages.text: {n}Cuando termina de estudiar el cogitador y las polvorientas pantallas de vídeo, Eogunn suelta un suspiro atronador.{/n} «Las funciones vitales de esta bendita máquina están a punto de fallar. Haré por ella todo lo que pueda, pero este cogitador es un trágico ejemplo de que hasta las obras del Omnissiah son mortales».
languages.original_text: {n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando termina de estudiar el cogitador y las polvorientas pantallas de vídeo, Eogunn suelta un suspiro atronador.{/n} «Las funciones vitales de esta bendita máquina están a punto de fallar. Haré por ella todo lo que pueda, pero este cogitador es un trágico ejemplo de que hasta las obras del Omnissiah son mortales».

languages.text: {n}当他研究完那台沉思者及其微微闪烁、布满灰尘的视讯屏幕后，伊奥贡深深地叹了一口气。{/n}“这台受祝机器的生命机能已经濒临终结。我会尽我所能挽救它，然而这台沉思者恰恰可悲地证明了，即便是欧姆尼赛亚的造物，也终有一死。”
languages.original_text: {n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

traits.locale_text: {n}当他研究完那台沉思者及其微微闪烁、布满灰尘的视讯屏幕后，伊奥贡深深地叹了一口气。{/n}“这台受祝机器的生命机能已经濒临终结。我会尽我所能挽救它，然而这台沉思者恰恰可悲地证明了，即便是欧姆尼赛亚的造物，也终有一死。”

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er den Cogitator und seine schwach schimmernden, verstaubten Vid-Bildschirme untersucht hat, stößt Eogunn einen tiefen Seufzer aus.{/n} "Die Vitalfunktionen dieser gesegneten Maschine sind dem Tode nah. Ich werde tun, was in meiner Macht steht, aber dieser Cogitator ist ein tragischer Beweis für die Tatsache, dass selbst das Werk des Omnissiah sterblich ist."
languages.original_text: {n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er den Cogitator und seine schwach schimmernden, verstaubten Vid-Bildschirme untersucht hat, stößt Eogunn einen tiefen Seufzer aus.{/n} "Die Vitalfunktionen dieser gesegneten Maschine sind dem Tode nah. Ich werde tun, was in meiner Macht steht, aber dieser Cogitator ist ein tragischer Beweis für die Tatsache, dass selbst das Werk des Omnissiah sterblich ist."

languages.text: {n}Alors qu'il finit d'étudier le cogitateur et ses écrans poussiéreux faiblement éclairés, Eogunn pousse un profond soupir rauque.{/n} « Les fonctions vitales de cette machine sacrée sont sur le point de s'éteindre. Je ferai tout ce qui est en mon pouvoir pour la sauver, mais ce cogitateur est un tragique rappel que même les créations de l'Omnimessie n'échappent pas à la mort. »
languages.original_text: {n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Alors qu'il finit d'étudier le cogitateur et ses écrans poussiéreux faiblement éclairés, Eogunn pousse un profond soupir rauque.{/n} « Les fonctions vitales de cette machine sacrée sont sur le point de s'éteindre. Je ferai tout ce qui est en mon pouvoir pour la sauver, mais ce cogitateur est un tragique rappel que même les créations de l'Omnimessie n'échappent pas à la mort. »

languages.text: {n}Kavramsayarı ve onun hafifçe parlayan, tozlu video ekranlarını incelemeyi bitirirken Eogunn, derin ve gürültülü bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Bu mübarek makinenin yaşamsal işlevleri yok olmanın eşiğinde. Onun için elimden geleni yapacağım ancak bu kavramsayar, Hermesih'in eserlerinin bile ölümlü olduğu gerçeğinin trajik bir kanıtı."
languages.original_text: {n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kavramsayarı ve onun hafifçe parlayan, tozlu video ekranlarını incelemeyi bitirirken Eogunn, derin ve gürültülü bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Bu mübarek makinenin yaşamsal işlevleri yok olmanın eşiğinde. Onun için elimden geleni yapacağım ancak bu kavramsayar, Hermesih'in eserlerinin bile ölümlü olduğu gerçeğinin trajik bir kanıtı."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは思考装置と、かすかに光る埃まみれのビデオ画面を研究し終えると、深い溜息をついた。{/n}「この神聖なる機械の生命機能は衰えつつある。できる限りのことはするが、この思考装置は、神聖なるオムニシアの創造物もまた死滅する運命にあることを示す悲劇的な証である。」
languages.original_text: {n}As he finishes studying the cogitator and its faintly glinting, dusty vid-screens, Eogunn exhales a deep rumble of a sigh.{/n} "The vital functions of this blessed machine are on the verge of dying. I will do for it what lies within my power, yet this cogitator is a tragic testament to the fact that even the works of the Omnissiah are mortal."
